===Pokémon Origins===
[[File:Sabrina PO.png|250px|thumb|Sabrina in [[Pokémon Origins]]]]
Sabrina appeared briefly in ''[[PO03|File 3: Giovanni]]''. She was shown being defeated by {{OBP|Red|Origins}} in a [[Gym]] {{pkmn|battle}}, earning him the {{badge|Marsh}}.
